div1.entryFree: Rivet, subst. a pin of iron driven through a hole, to keep different pieces of armour together: the armourers, with busy hammers closing --s up, H5 IV Chor. H5 IV Chor. with a palsy-fumbling at his gorget, shake in and out the r. Troil. I, 3, 175. I'll frush it and unlock the --s all, V, 6, 29.
